blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 44°F.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
